findings.description: The hint `data_reader` is missing from s3. The source's ファイルデータリーダ subsection explicitly references `:ref:`data_reader`` as the interface that abstracts all data input in the framework, making it a relevant retrieval keyword for users asking about data reader interfaces.
findings.source_evidence: 本フレームワークでは、アプリケーションに対するデータ入力は全て :ref:`data_reader` インターフェースによって抽象化されている。

findings.description: The source 論理パス h2 section contains an h3 subsection (設定方法) and the combined plain text exceeds 2000 characters (configuration table with multi-column notes, format spec, two code examples, and XML configuration example). Per V3 rules, when an RST h2 section has ≥2000 chars of plain text and an h3 exists, the knowledge file should split them. 設定方法 (configuration properties and XML example) would merit its own section.
findings.source_evidence: 設定方法 heading (h3 under 論理パス h2), followed by large basePathSettings/fileExtensions property table and XML code block
